title: UPF3A and UPF3B are redundant and modular activators of nonsense-mediated mRNA decay in human cells
author: Damaris Wallmeroth
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Source data for the publication: UPF3A and UPF3B are redundant and modular activators of nonsense-mediated mRNA decay in human cells. 
Includes raw image data (e.g. agarose gels, western blots, northern blots), quantifications, qPCR raw Ct values and other supporting material.
steps_raw:
